_comment: Copy to arms.json and edit. REQUIRED: set 'task_repo' to a local clone of openproblems-bio/task_ist_preprocessing (or use --mock-harness to smoke-test offline). Relative paths resolve against the repo root, so the runner works from any directory.
_inject_note: Skill arms get the playbooks injected into the prompt, so the skill CONTENT reaches the model regardless of whether the agent auto-loads skills. Set 'inject_skill_names' to a subset if you want only some.

antigravity.comment: Google Antigravity CLI (agy), headless via -p, --yolo auto-approves. Note: agy -p can emit no stdout in a non-TTY subprocess; the agent still writes files, which is what the grader reads.

opencode.comment: Non-interactive opencode; --model takes e.g. openrouter/qwen/qwen3-coder. Requires opencode configured with an OpenRouter key.

gemini.comment: Legacy Gemini CLI (replaced by Antigravity CLI). -y auto-approves, -p is the prompt.
